description.overview: Newfoundlands are gentle giants famous for water rescues. They're sweet-tempered, devoted dogs that are exceptional with children.
description.temperament: Newfies are sweet, patient, and devoted. They're natural guardians of children and known for their calm, gentle nature.
description.health: Prone to hip/elbow dysplasia, heart conditions, and bloat. Shorter lifespan due to size. Regular cardiac screening important.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Enjoy swimming. Avoid strenuous activity in heat—they overheat easily.

best_for: Patient owners who can handle drool and hair
verdict.summary: The ultimate nanny dog—Newfies are sweet, gentle giants that adore children. They need space, tolerate drool and shedding, and have shorter lifespans. Perfect for families who want a devoted gentle giant.
